Home

MPG and Cost Calculator and Tracker

Spritmonitor.de calculates your car's gas mileage and helps to manage the vehicle's costs. After a free registration, you will be able to use all functions, e.g. include an icon in bulletin boards, analyse costs or enter fuelings with your smartphone.

Does your mileage vary?

Browse real MPG data

Advanced search...



Spritmonitor.de

Smartphone-App


Use Spritmonitor.de on the road with your Android- or Apple-smartphone and the Spritmonitor.de app! Enter new fuelings right at the gas station. The app is available for free on the Google Play Store and on the Apple App Store.
Spritmonitor.de

Evaluations

Fuel price trajectories

Fuelprices change almost hourly. Have a look at our illustration of the ups (often) and downs (not so often). Fuel price trajectories.

Current activity at Spritmonitor.de

  • 67 users logged in
  • 302 new vehicles in the last 24 hours
  • 14.030 new fuel ups in the last 24 hours
  • 360.730 new fuel ups in the last month

Social media services

Advertisement

Spritmonitor.de

  • helps you to calculate and track your fuel economy and vehicle-related costs
  • contains real-world MPG data of thousands of users
  • reminds you of important events such as car services
  • provides a dynamic icon that always shows your current MPG
To use these and even more functions register a user account for free.

Frequently asked questions:

  • My car does not show up in the search results.
  • Where do I find the ID of my vehicle?
  • Can I also track the mileage of my LPG or CNG powered vehicle?
  • Can I use Spritmonitor.de on my smartphone?

Database statistics:

  • 1.274.516 vehicles
  • 862.665 users
  • 54.163.573 fuel ups
  • 27.255.898.150 km
  • 2.005.968.135 l of gas
  • 59.555.841 kWh electricity
This corresponds to the annual consumption of 17.016 single-family homes.
